title: Contents_Table
content:
Contents_Table

Table of Contents: Full Prompt–Response History

This outline catalogs the entire prompt-response chain contained in your 1prompt note. Each section is titled by your prompt, followed by the summary of its paired response. Redundancy, meta commentary, and expansions are noted where they occur.

⸻

I. Origin Layer

1. 1prompt (seed note)
• Establishes conceptual frame: four-fold recursive loop.
• Introduces Layer 0 → Layer 3 diagram.
• Names the project 4-ivi374-F0Rivi4 (“recursive + generative organ body”).
• Invites: “What do you want to build first?”

⸻

II. Repository Mapping Layer

2. 7prompt – Map out current repos
• User request: logical map of all personal and organizational repos.

3. 7response – Comprehensive Repository Map
• Lists 23 org repos grouped by function (core, governance, tools, web, data, apps).
